suggestions.summary: Auto-detected from press: "Himachal Pradesh’s poorly planned Mandi airport risks its limited fertile agricultural land - The Caravan" — review the linked article and edit before promoting.

methodology: Keyword scan of press snapshot. False positives are normal — a signed-in moderator reviews each before promotion. Categories: incident, defect, audit, grievance, litigation.
